author: Kuestenlogik
name: Surgewave Protocol Plugin
description: A Surgewave protocol-adapter plugin scaffold (IProtocolPlugin) with manifest, stub class and a passing xUnit test.

PluginId.description: Reverse-DNS unique plugin id (matches the v1 manifest schema pattern).

FeatureId.description: Feature id reported by the IPlugin contract.

DefaultPort.description: Default TCP port the protocol listens on (0 = shares HTTP port).
